name: Swemp
description_short: Swemp Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union offering auto refinancing, personal loans, and online banking to its community members.
description_long:
Swemp Federal Credit Union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving its community through traditional credit union services. The organization is NCUA-insured and maintains a physical location with standard business hours (8:30 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Monday through Friday), supplemented by online banking capabilities. The credit union emphasizes accessibility and personal service as core operational values.

The institution offers auto loan refinancing for members seeking to reduce monthly car payments on vehicles financed elsewhere. To facilitate this service, they request specific borrower information including proof of income, vehicle details (year, make, model, mileage), current financing location, and a ten-day payoff statement. Beyond auto refinancing, they provide general personal lending products and online banking access, though specific loan amounts, terms, and APR information are not detailed on their current website.

Swemp FCU distinguishes itself through emphasis on direct human interaction and service quality. Member testimonials highlight the availability of live customer service representatives, simplified loan application processes, and staff friendliness. The organization explicitly positions personal customer service as a differentiator in an increasingly digital financial landscape, with members noting positive experiences with both phone support and in-branch interactions.

The company is limited in publicly available information about product offerings, rates, and specific terms. While they clearly serve their membership base, potential new members cannot easily verify current loan products, APR ranges, membership requirements, or account minimums from the website. The scheduled maintenance notice indicates active technology infrastructure, but the overall web presence provides minimal detail about comprehensive financial products or competitive positioning.
services: Auto loan refinancing for vehicles financed elsewhere
Online banking platform with periodic maintenance windows
Share accounts (standard credit union deposit products)
pros: Member testimonials confirm live person customer service availability by phone
Offers auto loan refinancing to help members reduce existing car payments elsewhere
Described by members as having a streamlined loan application process
Staff noted by members as consistently friendly and professional
NCUA-insured member-owned institution with not-for-profit structure
Maintains both physical branch location and online banking platform
Explicit commitment to member financial wellbeing stated in organizational mission
cons: Website provides minimal information about loan products, terms, APR ranges, or specific services offered
No details on membership eligibility requirements or how to join
Limited product transparency makes it difficult for prospective members to compare offerings
No information on account types, minimum balances, or savings products
Scheduled maintenance windows indicate periodic online banking unavailability
best_for: Members seeking to refinance auto loans from other lenders with personalized service
Community members who prefer phone and in-branch banking over fully digital services
Borrowers valuing direct human interaction in loan application and approval processes
diagnosis: Swemp FCU is best suited for community members and existing customers prioritizing personal service and local banking relationships, particularly those seeking auto refinancing with direct human interaction. The main caveat is that the organization provides minimal public information about products, rates, membership requirements, and loan terms, making it difficult for prospective members to evaluate offerings or compare competitively.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Swemp — Credit Union in TEXARKANA, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Swemp — NCUA-insured credit union in TEXARKANA, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
